suggestions: I'm grateful for the quiet peace of the morning before Fajr, allowing me to start my day with a calm and clear mind.
I'm thankful for finally tracking down and fixing that stubborn memory leak bug that had been bothering the team all week.
I'm grateful for a warm cup of teh tarik and a packet of nasi lemak to fuel my morning stand-up meeting.
I'm thankful for the rezeki of a stable job in tech that allows me to support myself and comfortably contribute to my family.
I'm grateful for the soothing sound of the afternoon rain outside while I stay warm and focused working from my desk.
I'm thankful for a clean git merge with absolutely zero conflicts on a major feature branch today.
I'm grateful for a quick, spontaneous catch-up with my university friends at the mamak after a busy week.
I'm thankful for the moments of quiet focus I find during my daily prayers, helping me reset when work gets overwhelming.
I'm grateful for a supportive senior developer who took the time to patiently review my pull request and offer great mentorship.
I'm thankful for a smooth, uncrowded LRT commute home, giving me time to unwind and listen to my favorite tech podcast.
I'm grateful for the simple joy of sitting down for a home-cooked dinner with my parents after a long day of coding.
I'm thankful for a Friday afternoon production deployment that went live seamlessly without a single hotfix needed.
I'm grateful for the sweet, crispy comfort of fresh pisang goreng during my 4 PM screen break.
I'm thankful for the discipline and energy to keep up with my prayers even when project deadlines are tight.
I'm grateful for how much my coding skills and career confidence have grown compared to where I was a couple of years ago.
